name: arcgentic
description: Agentic harness for rigorous round-driven development. Orchestrates planning, execution, external audit, and reference tracking across roles — with mechanically verifiable state machine, fact-table audit gates, and lesson codification.
author: Arc Studio
status: v0.2.0-alpha.1 — v0.2.0 P0 complete: full role coverage (plan-round + execute-round skills + 5 new agents [planner / developer / ba-designer / cr-reviewer / se-contract] + audit_check engine + 2 hooks). 251 pytest tests + 6 bash tests; mypy --strict + ruff clean. 4 forward-debts registered (ER-RETRY / ER-AUDIT-GATE-4 / ER-AUDIT-FACTS / ER-STATE-ROW) for v0.2.1+. P1/P2 (codify-lesson, track-refs, cross-session-handoff) remain declarative-ahead.
